channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says 'Clock is Ticking' for Iran as Shaky Ceasefire Continues
item.description: President Trump said 'there won't be anything left of them' if Iranian leaders do not 'get moving, FAST.'

item.title: Great white shark kills spearfishing diver in 'horrific event'
item.description: A 38-year-old man was spearfishing with friends when a shark attacked him on a coral reef near Rottnest Island, police reported.

item.title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship arrives in Netherlands
item.description: The cruise ship affected by a deadly hantavirus outbreak has docked at the Dutch port of Rotterdam for disinfection, concluding a troubled journey.

item.title: Strong earthquake in southern China kills two, forces 7,000 to evacuate
item.description: A 5.2 magnitude earthquake struck China's Guangxi region, killing two people and causing building collapses.
